overall.description: Aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night from a video game, featuring two large holographic koi fish swimming in circular patterns around a central intersection. The scene showcases heavy neon lighting, surrounding skyscrapers, and a distinctive circular road layout with radiating streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic circular intersection with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of the plaza from a high vantage point on a surrounding building

notable_agents.action: orange holographic koi fish swimming in a clockwise circle around the plaza center
blue holographic koi fish swimming in a counter-clockwise circle around the plaza center

entered.detail: dark circular center of the intersection with a geometric grid pattern
circular array of yellow lights surrounding the plaza center in concentric rings
multiple multi-lane roads radiating from the center like spokes with moving vehicle lights
tall building with prominent vertical yellow neon light strips running up its facade
cluster of dark high-rise buildings with scattered neon signage
colorful illuminated advertisements and holographic displays at the bottom edge of the frame

segments.scene_description: A stationary aerial view captures a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by two large holographic koi fish—one orange and one blue—swimming in opposite circular paths around the center. The circular intersection features concentric rings of yellow lights with highways radiating outward, surrounded by towering skyscrapers adorned with neon lights. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the radial roads below while the camera maintains a steady overhead perspective from a high vantage point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady aerial perspective over a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, capturing the rhythmic motion of holographic entities within a neon-lit urban core. It begins with a high vantage point overlooking a circular intersection where two massive holographic koi fish, one orange and one blue, swim in opposing circular paths. As the camera holds its position, the concentric rings of yellow lights at the center emphasize the radial symmetry of the highways stretching outward. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding skyline of towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon signage. Finally, the view settles on the sparse vehicle traffic flowing along the radiating roads below, grounding the ethereal glow of the holograms in the city's mechanical pulse.
